title: Senior Python Developer
text:
Senior Python Developer
Tech Corp - San Francisco, CA

About the Role:
We are seeking a Senior Python Developer to join our growing engineering team.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and develop Python applications using FastAPI
- Implement machine learning features
- Lead code reviews and mentor junior developers
- Collaborate with product and design teams

Requirements:
- 5+ years of Python development experience
- Strong knowledge of FastAPI and REST API development
- Experience with machine learning frameworks (TensorFlow, scikit-learn)
- Proficiency with Git and version control
- Docker and containerization experience
- Team leadership experience

Preferred Qualifications:
- NLP or computer vision experience
- Cloud deployment experience (AWS, GCP)
- Agile/Scrum experience

Compensation:
- Competitive salary
- Health insurance
- Remote work options

title: Full Stack Developer
text:
Full Stack Developer
Web Solutions - New York, NY

About the Role:
Join our team as a Full Stack Developer and build scalable web applications.

Key Responsibilities:
- Develop React frontend applications
- Build and maintain REST APIs using Node.js
- Design database schemas and optimize queries
- Implement security best practices

Requirements:
- 3+ years of full stack development experience
- React proficiency
- Node.js and Express experience
- SQL and NoSQL database knowledge
- Git version control
- REST API design understanding

Preferred Qualifications:
- TypeScript experience
- Testing frameworks experience
- AWS or cloud platform experience
- Agile development experience

Compensation:
- Competitive salary
- Health insurance
- Professional development budget

title: Machine Learning Engineer
text:
Machine Learning Engineer
AI Startup - Remote

About the Role:
Build state-of-the-art ML models that power our AI platform.

Key Responsibilities:
- Develop and train deep learning models
- Implement NLP and computer vision solutions
- Deploy and optimize models for production
- Collaborate with data engineers and product teams

Requirements:
- 4+ years of machine learning experience
- TensorFlow or PyTorch expertise
- Python programming proficiency
- Deep learning fundamentals
- Docker and containerization knowledge
- Kubernetes or orchestration experience

Preferred Qualifications:
- Research paper publication
- Kaggle competition participation
- Production ML system experience
- AWS or GCP experience

Compensation:
- Competitive salary
- Remote work
- Professional development
